item.ns0:headline: Converting to Emerging Income ETF; vote Sept 23
item.description:
Converting to Emerging Income ETF; vote Sept 23

Proposes to convert its Emerging Markets Debt Fund into the William Blair Emerging Income ETF, with shares exchanged at equal NAV. Shareholder vote scheduled for September 23, 2026; conversion expected October 16, 2026. The exchange is expected to be tax-free, and the portfolio management team remains unchanged.

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · SYNA
item.ns0:headline: Acquired by ON Semiconductor for 1.350 shares per SYNA share
item.description:
Acquired by ON Semiconductor for 1.350 shares per SYNA share

Entered into a definitive merger agreement with ON Semiconductor (onsemi). Each Synaptics common share will be exchanged for 1.350 shares of ON Semiconductor common stock. The merger is subject to Synaptics stockholder approval, antitrust clearance, and other customary conditions.

About: Synaptics Incorporated develops, markets, and sells semiconductor products worldwide. The company provides touch, display, biometrics, voice, audio, processor, wireless, and multimedia products for mobile, personal computers, smart home, industrial, and automotive applications, as well as modular development kits, open software frameworks, and optimized AI/ML toolchains.

  • Counterparty: ON Semiconductor Corporation
  • Offer price: 1.350 ON Semiconductor shares per SYNA share
  • Consideration: stock
  • Announced: 2026-06-25

item.title: 🪙 Debt Restr. · CRMT
item.ns0:headline: Enters forbearance with Silver Point; waives defaults, launches strategic review
item.description:
Enters forbearance with Silver Point; waives defaults, launches strategic review

America's Car-Mart entered into a forbearance agreement with Silver Point Finance waiving defaults on liquidity and collateral coverage covenants through September 7, 2026. The company must form a special committee, deliver forecasts, and commence a marketing process for potential financing, restructuring, or M&A. Two new independent directors appointed; up to $18M in fees.

About: America's Car-Mart, Inc., through its subsidiaries, operates as an automotive retailer for the used car market in the United States. It sells older model used vehicles and provides financing for its customers. The company was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Rogers, Arkansas.

  • Counterparty: Silver Point Finance, LLC
  • Announced: 2026-06-19

item.ns0:headline: Acquires Legacy Teamshares for $525M stock; closes de-SPAC
item.description:
Acquires Legacy Teamshares for $525M stock; closes de-SPAC

(formerly Live Oak Acquisition Corp V) completed its business combination with Legacy Teamshares, issuing $525M in stock valued at $10.00/share. The combined company will operate as Teamshares Inc and trade on Nasdaq under ticker TMS. Legacy Teamshares stockholders received shares of common stock and earnout rights.

About: As of June 19, 2026, Live Oak Acquisition Corp. V was acquired by Teamshares Inc., in a reverse merger transaction. Live Oak Acquisition Corp. V does not have significant operations. It intends to effect a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was incorporated in 2024 and is based in Memphis, Tennessee.

  • Offer price: $10.00
  • Deal value: $525,000,000
  • Consideration: stock
  • Announced: 2025-11-14
  • Expected Close: 2026-06-18

item.title: 🪙 Debt Restr. · Debt For Equity Swap · VVOS
item.ns0:headline: Extends debt-to-equity conversion with Streeterville to Aug 31; up to $4.5M
item.description:
Extends debt-to-equity conversion with Streeterville to Aug 31; up to $4.5M

Extended the deadline for its debt conversion agreement with Streeterville Capital to August 31, 2026. Streeterville reaffirmed commitment to convert up to $4.5M of debt into perpetual preferred and common stock, contingent on Vivos raising $2.6M in equity. The extension aims to allow an organized equity raise and rights offering, and to maintain Nasdaq compliance.

About: Vivos Therapeutics, Inc. operates as a medical technology and healthcare services company that develops and commercializes treatment modalities for patients with dentofacial abnormalities, obstructive sleep apnea (OSA), and snoring in adults. It offers The Vivos Method, a non-invasive, non-surgical, non-pharmaceutical, multi-disciplinary treatment modality for the treatment of dentofacial abnormalities, OSA, and snoring.

  • Counterparty: Streeterville Capital, LLC
  • Deal value: $4,500,000
  • Consideration: stock
  • Announced: 2026-06-18
  • Expected Close: 2026-08-31

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · PETV
item.ns0:headline: Acquires PBM for 3M restricted shares; $5M financing condition
item.description:
Acquires PBM for 3M restricted shares; $5M financing condition

Entered into a merger agreement to acquire PiezoBioMembrane, Inc. (PBM) through a subsidiary merger. PBM shareholders will receive an aggregate of 3,000,000 shares of PetVivo restricted common stock, with additional milestone shares subject to forfeiture upon achieving development and regulatory milestones. Closing is subject to customary conditions, including PetVivo completing an equity financing of at least $5.0 million.

About: PetVivo Holdings, Inc., a biomedical device company, manufactures, commercializes, and licenses medical devices and therapeutics for animals in the United States. The company’s lead product is Spryng, a veterinarian-administered, intraarticular injection for the management of lameness and other joint afflictions, such as osteoarthritis in dogs and horses. It also provides therapeutic devices for veterinary and human clinical applications. PetVivo Holdings, Inc.

  • Counterparty: PiezoBioMembrane, Inc.
  • Consideration: stock
  • Announced: 2026-06-24

item.title: 📤 Divestiture · ULIX
item.ns0:headline: Sells Ulixe Nova to Condotti Capital for €1.00 nominal
item.description:
Sells Ulixe Nova to Condotti Capital for €1.00 nominal

Sold its wholly owned subsidiary Ulixe Nova S.r.l. to Condotti Capital S.r.l. for nominal consideration of €1.00, plus a post-closing adjustment of reciprocal payables. The sale is part of a strategic reorganization ahead of a planned Nasdaq uplisting. The board cited Ulixe Nova's capital requirements and administrative burdens as reasons for the disposal.

About: Ulixe Corp., a development stage company, engages in the development of ride-hailing and food delivery computer and mobile device application in the United States. The company was formerly known as WarpSpeed Taxi Inc. and changed its name to Ulixe Corp. in August 2025. The company was incorporated in 2020 and is based in Nairobi, Kenya. As of June 13, 2025, Ulixe Corp. operates as a subsidiary of Ulixe One Corp.

  • Counterparty: Condotti Capital S.r.l.
  • Deal value: €1.00
  • Stake: 100%
  • Consideration: cash
  • Announced: 2026-06-18
  • Expected Close: 2026-06-18

item.title: 🧭 Domicile · GTES
item.ns0:headline: Shareholders approve redomiciliation to Bermuda; court hearing July 16
item.description:
Shareholders approve redomiciliation to Bermuda; court hearing July 16

Shareholders approved the redomiciliation from England and Wales to Bermuda via a scheme of arrangement. At the Court Meeting, 91.9% of shares voted in favor; at the General Meeting, 91.55% voted for the scheme. The one-for-one exchange of Gates shares for New Gates shares is expected to become effective on July 20, 2026, subject to court sanction on July 16.

About: Gates Industrial Corporation plc manufactures and sells engineered power transmission and fluid power solutions in the United States, rest of North America, South America, the United Kingdom, Luxembourg, rest of Europe, the Middle East, Africa, India, East Asia, and Greater China. It operates through two segments, Power Transmission and Fluid Power.

item.description:
Forge Nano partners with Samsung SDI for US battery cell production

Forge Nano announced a strategic partnership with Samsung SDI to enable U.S. production of advanced battery cells. The partnership is a positive development for Forge Nano, which is merging with Archimedes Tech SPAC Partners II Co. (ATII) under a definitive merger agreement signed April 20, 2026. The transaction remains subject to shareholder approval and other closing conditions.

About: Nanobiotix S.A. operates as a clinical-stage biotechnology that focuses on developing product candidates for the treatment of cancer and other unmet medical needs. Its lead product candidate is NBTXR3, a sterile aqueous suspension of crystalline hafnium oxide nanoparticles used for the treatment of soft tissue sarcoma, head and neck, liver, prostate, pancreatic, esophageal, rectal, and non-small cell lung cancer.

The board established an Investment Committee chaired by Kazarian to manage the portfolio internally while the Special Committee evaluates potential external management arrangements. item.title: ⚔️ Proxy Contest · FRMI
item.ns0:headline: Proposes June 30 town hall with Perry; calls for strategic dual track
item.description:
Proposes June 30 town hall with Perry; calls for strategic dual track

Toby Neugebauer, co-founder and largest shareholder of Fermi, proposes a town hall webinar on June 30 with Governor Rick Perry and Griffin Perry to discuss the company's past, present, and future. He also calls for a strategic dual track process to explore a change-of-control transaction versus the current tenant track. The activist is soliciting agent designations for a special meeting, as the board has a 70% supermajority vote threshold that would be virtually impossible to reverse.

About: Fermi Inc. engages in the development of private power campus for AI-centric customers in the United States. The company also develops, owns, and leases grid-independent energy generation and high-performance computing campuses; develops and operates integrated power generation and computing infrastructure. It also engages in acquisition of land, permitting, construction, and long-term leases.

Merges Noble Africa sub with ENDRA; combined co. to list as NOBA

Announced a merger of its wholly-owned subsidiary Noble Africa (intermediate holding company for Renergen) with ENDRA Life Sciences. Noble Africa will survive and become a Nasdaq-listed company under ticker NOBA. ASPI will own ~89% of the combined company; concurrent $50M private placement. Closing expected Q3/Q4 2026, subject to ENDRA stockholder approval and SEC registration.

About: ASP Isotopes Inc., a development stage advanced materials company, engages in the production, distribution, marketing, and sale of isotopes in South Africa,Hong Kong, and United States. It operates in two segments, Nuclear Fuels, and Specialist Isotopes and Related Services. The Nuclear Fuels segment focuses on the research and development of technologies and methods used to produce high-assay low-enriched uranium (HALEU) and Lithium-6 for the advanced nuclear fuels target end market.

  • Counterparty: ENDRA Life Sciences Inc.
  • Stake: 89
  • Consideration: stock

item.title: 🪙 Debt Restr. · BAK
item.ns0:headline: Initiates mediation with financial creditors for capital restructuring
item.description:
Initiates mediation with financial creditors for capital restructuring

Braskem S.A. has initiated a mediation proceeding and filed a request for precautionary injunctive relief before the 2nd Bankruptcy and Judicial Reorganization Court of São Paulo to facilitate negotiations with its financial creditors. The goal is a consensual, structural, and orderly solution for its capital structure, aligned with the company's liquidity position and global petrochemical industry conditions. The restructuring is limited to financial creditors and does not affect suppliers, customers, or other stakeholders.

About: Braskem S.A., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the manufacture, sale, import, and export of chemicals, petrochemicals, and fuels in Brazil. The company supplies electricity and other inputs to second-generation producers; sells utilities, such as steam, water, compressed air and industrial gases; industrial services; and engages in the production, supply, and sale of electric energy and gas.

item.description:
Extends deadline to 27 months; 9.3M shares redeemed at $10.62, trust ~$23M

Shareholders approved an amendment to extend the deadline for a business combination to up to 27 months from the December 2024 IPO. In connection, 9,339,529 shares were redeemed at approximately $10.62 per share, reducing the trust account to about $23 million and outstanding shares to 2,160,471. The sponsor will contribute up to $60,000 per month via a promissory note to fund the trust for each monthly extension.

About: Range Capital Acquisition Corp. does not have significant operations. The company was incorporated in 2024 and is based in Cold Spring Harbor, New York.

He proposes 7 independent nominees (Daglio, Elson, Jimenez, Yang, Hooda, Pujadas) to restore governance and evaluate strategic alternatives including a change of control process. item.title: ⚖️ Litigation · Won · IONS
item.ns0:headline: FDA approves TRYNGOLZA (olezarsen) for sHTG; first approved therapy to reduce acute pancreatitis risk
item.description:
FDA approves TRYNGOLZA (olezarsen) for sHTG; first approved therapy to reduce acute pancreatitis risk

Announced FDA approval of TRYNGOLZA (olezarsen) as an adjunct to diet to reduce triglycerides and the risk of acute pancreatitis in adults with severe hypertriglyceridemia (sHTG, TG ≥500 mg/dL). Approval based on Phase 3 CORE/CORE2 studies showing up to 72% triglyceride reduction and up to 91% reduction in acute pancreatitis events. TRYNGOLZA is Ionis' first independent commercial launch in a prevalent condition; product available in 50 mg or 80 mg monthly autoinjector, with U.S. launch expected in July 2026.

About: Ionis Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a commercial-stage biotechnology company, provides RNA-targeted medicines in the United States. The company offers TRYNGOLZA reduces triglyceride levels in adults with familial chylomicronemia syndrome (FCS) and acute pancreatitis; DAWNZERA for prophylaxis to prevent attacks of hereditary angioedema in adults; WAINUA for the treatment of the polyneuropathy of hereditary transthyretin-medicated amyloidosis (ATTRv-PN) in adults; and SPINRAZA for pediatric and adult pat…

  • Announced: 2026-06-24

item.description:

Chemours agreed to a consent decree with the EPA and WVDEP resolving PFAS emissions claims. The company will pay a $22.5M civil penalty in three annual installments and dedicate $90M over 15 years to mitigation projects. The Thermal & Specialized Solutions segment provides refrigerants, thermal management solutions, propellants, foam blowing agents, and specialty solvents under the Freon and Opteon brand names.

Agreed to sell its legacy mining subsidiaries (Comstock Mining LLC, Comstock Processing LLC, Comstock Exploration and Development LLC, and Comstock Real Estate Inc.) to Mackay Precious Metals Inc., a subsidiary of Mackay Gold & Silver Corp. (TSXV: MACK). Consideration includes $20M cash at close, 2M shares of Mackay Parent (valued at ~$3.5M), a $7M secured deferred payment due in 18 months, a $10M contingent payment if a construction decision or change of control occurs within 7 years, assumption of reclamation liabilities, and a retained 1.5% NSR royalty. Closing expected early July 2026, subject to TSX-V approval; the divestiture is part of Comstock's transformation to a renewable metals company and is expected to reduce annual costs by over $1.5M.

About: Comstock Inc. commercializes technologies, systems, and supply chains that extract, process, and convert under-utilized waste and natural resources into clean energy and clean energy supporting products in the United States. Is subject to an unsolicited cash tender offer from Zodiac Partners II, LLC (an acquisition entity of Camac Fund, LP) at $0.84 per share, valuing the equity at approximately $47 million. The offer, originally launched May 12, 2026, has been extended to expire at 5:00 PM ET on July 24, 2026. item.title: ⚖️ Litigation · Won · SPRO
item.ns0:headline: FDA approves Utebzi for cUTIs; first oral carbapenem
item.description:
FDA approves Utebzi for cUTIs; first oral carbapenem

Announced FDA approval of Utebzi (tebipenem pivoxil) for complicated urinary tract infections in adults with limited oral options. This is the first oral carbapenem antibiotic approved in the US, based on the PIVOT-PO trial showing non-inferiority to IV treatment. The drug was developed under GSK's exclusive license and is expected to be available by end of 2026.

About: Spero Therapeutics, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, focuses on identifying and developing novel treatments for multi-drug resistant (MDR) bacterial infections and rare diseases in the United States. The company’s product candidates include Tebipenem HBr (tebipenem pivoxil hydrobromide), an oral carbapenem-class antibiotic to treat complicated urinary tract infections, including pyelonephritis for adult patients, which has completed second Phase 3 trial.

  • Announced: 2026-06-17

item.description:
Acquires Comstock's Nevada mining assets for $20M cash + 2M shares + $7M deferred

Mackay Gold & Silver Corp. acquires 100% of Comstock Inc.'s Nevada mining assets (Silver City Lode properties) for US$20M cash and 2M common shares at closing, plus US$7M payable within 18 months in cash/shares. The deal consolidates the largest land package in Comstock District history (4,343 ha), adding two oxide gold-silver deposits (Lucerne and Dayton) with historical resources and a permitted heap-leach/Merrill-Crowe processing facility. Mackay has over US$60M cash to fund the acquisition and ongoing exploration.

item.title: ⚖️ Litigation · Lost · BIOX
item.ns0:headline: Lost partial summary judgment on liability in noteholder dispute; damages pending
item.description:
Lost partial summary judgment on liability in noteholder dispute; damages pending

The Supreme Court of New York granted plaintiffs' motion for partial summary judgment on liability, finding that multiple Events of Default occurred and that Bioceres and its guarantors are liable under the Note Purchase Agreements. Damages, default interest, contractual premiums, and the commercial reasonableness of the January 2026 foreclosure auction remain to be determined. The company continues to contest the allegations and intends to defend vigorously, while also advancing a strategic review of continuing operations and liability management initiatives.

About: Bioceres Crop Solutions Corp., together with its subsidiaries, develops and commercializes crop productivity solutions. It operates through Seed and Integrated Products, Crop Protection, and Crop Nutrition segments. The Seed and Integrated Products segment provides seed traits, germplasms, and seed treatment packs for healthier and higher yielding crops. The Crop Protection segment develops, produces, and markets Rizoderma, adjuvants, therapies, herbicides, insecticides, fungicides, and baits.

  • Counterparty: Jasper Lake Ventures One LLC et al.
  • Announced: 2026-06-16

item.description:

Diana Shipping increased its offer to acquire Genco to $27.34 per share ($24.80 cash + 1 Diana share valued at $2.54), representing a 53% premium to Genco's undisturbed price. The Genco board has rejected the offer three times without engagement. Diana urges the board to negotiate in good faith.

About: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the ocean transportation of drybulk cargoes worldwide. It operates through two segments: major bulk and minor bulk fleet. The company owns and operates dry bulk vessels to transports iron ore, grains, coal, steel products, and other drybulk cargoes. It charters its vessels primarily to trading houses, including commodities traders; producers; and government-owned entities.

  • Offer price: 27.34
  • Premium: 53
  • Consideration: cash+stock

item.ns0:headline: Spins off retail business via deconsolidation; now pure-play medical cannabis
item.description:
Spins off retail business via deconsolidation; now pure-play medical cannabis

Completed deconsolidation of its wholly owned retail subsidiary, Glass House Retail LLC, effective June 12, 2026, separating the dual-use cannabis business from its medical cannabis operations. The company's remaining operations consist solely of medical marijuana facilities licensed by California and the DEA. Pro forma financials reflect the removal of retail contributions. The company highlights an upcoming rescheduling hearing for recreational cannabis on June 29, 2026, which could further boost its medical cannabis focus and tax benefits from Schedule III status.

About: Glass House Brands Inc., together with its subsidiaries, operates as an integrated cannabis company in the United States. It operates through three segments: Retail; Wholesale Biomass; and Cannabis-Related Consumer Packaged Goods. The Retail segment owns, and operates retail cannabis stores, and dispensary operation management services. The Wholesale Biomass segment includes propagation, nursery, flowering canopy, dries, processes, and distributes cannabis biomass.

Rumble (now RUM Group Inc.) completed its acquisition of Northern Data AG and entered into a €317.5M secured credit facility with Tether. The facility matures in 5 years, bears interest at 3% + EURIBOR, and includes a one-time conversion right for Tether after 1 year at the greater of 10-day VWAP or $7.88 per Rumble share. Tether also received a pre-funded warrant for 46,719,910 Rumble shares at $0.0001 per share as consideration for transferring 50% of its receivable from Northern Data. The company changed its legal name to RUM Group Inc. effective June 18, 2026.

item.ns0:headline: Sells European operations to CEO's entity for CAD$10.5M debt assumption
item.description:
Sells European operations to CEO's entity for CAD$10.5M debt assumption

Entered a non-binding letter of intent to sell its European-focused assets (via IMC Holdings) to Slil.com Holding Ltd., a company beneficially owned by CEO Oren Shuster. Slil will assume approximately CAD$10.5M of debt (CAD$7.5M retained liabilities + CAD$3M short-term liabilities), significantly reducing IMC's debt burden. The company will retain its Israeli operations and focus on that market. The transaction is subject to negotiation of a definitive agreement, approval by a special committee of independent directors, and regulatory clearances. The company intends to rely on financial hardship exemptions from formal valuation and minority shareholder requirements under MI 61-101.

About: IM Cannabis Corp. engages in importation, distribution and sale of medical cannabis products in Israel and Germany. IM Cannabis Corp. was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.

  • Counterparty: Slil.com Holding Ltd.
  • Deal value: CAD$10,500,000

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Unsolicited · GNK
item.ns0:headline: Receives increased unsolicited bid from Diana at $27.34/sh (53% premium)
item.description:
Receives increased unsolicited bid from Diana at $27.34/sh (53% premium)

Receives a revised unsolicited offer from Diana Shipping Inc. (NYSE: DSX) to acquire all outstanding shares not already owned by Diana for $27.34 per share, consisting of $24.80 in cash plus one Diana share valued at $2.54. The offer represents a 53% premium to Genco's undisturbed price and a 16% premium to its June 16 close. Diana has requested that Genco delay its June 18 annual meeting to allow the board and shareholders to evaluate the proposal; the cash component is fully financed with $1.433 billion in committed bank financing.

About: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the ocean transportation of drybulk cargoes worldwide. It operates through two segments: major bulk and minor bulk fleet. The company owns and operates dry bulk vessels to transports iron ore, grains, coal, steel products, and other drybulk cargoes. It charters its vessels primarily to trading houses, including commodities traders; producers; and government-owned entities.

  • Counterparty: Diana Shipping Inc. (DSX)
  • Offer price: $27.34 per share
  • Premium: 53%

GSK's Utebzi (tebipenem pivoxil) approved by FDA for adults with complicated urinary tract infections (cUTI). GSK holds exclusive global license from Spero Therapeutics (excluding select Asian territories).

The company intends to submit the BLA in the third quarter of 2026 and will align with FDA on the confirmatory study design prior to submission. The FDA committed to work expeditiously on alignment.

Entered a definitive merger agreement to acquire 100% of NOMAD Transportable Power Systems, a mobile utility-grade BESS provider. NOMAD shareholders will receive a pro rata portion of up to 50,500 shares of Series D Convertible Preferred (convertible into 50.5M LIXT common shares at $1.00/share) and up to 3M LIXT common shares; unaccredited stockholders get cash based on VWAP. Expected close within 120 days (by October 2026).

item.description:

Max Resource entered a definitive option agreement with Bolt Metals for its Florália high-purity iron property in Brazil. Bolt can earn 100% by issuing 26.8M common shares to Max over 30 months, with a minimum 25% post-issuance stake. Separately, Bolt issued 4M shares and 2M pre-funded warrants to Max to settle exploration costs. Max gains board nomination rights if it holds ≥5% of Bolt. The transactions are subject to regulatory approvals.

About: Max Resource Corp. engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral properties in South America and Canada. It primarily explores for gold, silver, copper, and iron deposits. The company holds 100% interest in the Sierra Azul project located in the northeastern Colombia; and Florália Property located near the east the city Belo Horizonte, Brazil. It also holds a 100% interest in the Mora Property located near the south of Medellin, Colombia.

ADS holders received one share of US Holdco common stock per ADS (1 ADR = 12 ordinary shares); ordinary shareholders received one share per 12 ordinary shares. The company was formerly known as Quantum Resources Limited and changed its name to Nova Minerals Limited in December 2017.

item.description:

Sold a 27% non-controlling equity interest in its midstream subsidiary Pinnacle Gas Services to Sixth Street for $600 million, implying a $2.2 billion enterprise value for Pinnacle. Proceeds were used to fully retire Pinnacle's preferred equity and outstanding indebtedness, deleveraging the balance sheet and reducing fixed charges by ~$40M per year. Comstock retains a 73% controlling stake and will continue to operate Pinnacle under a management services agreement.

About: Comstock Resources, Inc., an independent energy company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, development, and production of natural gas and oil properties in the United States. Its assets covering an area of approximately 1,069,991 acres are located in the Haynesville and Bossier shales located in North Louisiana and East Texas. The company was incorporated in 1919 and is headquartered in Frisco, Texas.

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · NIXX
item.ns0:headline: Acquires Tachyon in reverse merger valued at ~$1B; target shareholders to hold 90%
item.description:
Acquires Tachyon in reverse merger valued at ~$1B; target shareholders to hold 90%

Entered a binding letter of intent to acquire Tachyon 9, a digital infrastructure company with a 620-acre hyperscale campus in North Dakota targeting 1 GW power capacity. Tachyon is valued at ~$1B; consideration will be Nixxy common stock at a VWAP-based price with floor and cap. Tachyon shareholders are expected to own at least 90% of the combined company. Closing is subject to due diligence, Nasdaq approval, fairness opinion, board and stockholder approval, and a PIPE financing of up to $75M.

About: Nixxy, Inc. engages in telecommunications services, data infrastructure, and related platform in the United States and internationally. It offers cloud-based telecommunications platform comprising voice and messaging infrastructure, routing, and billing systems; and enables real-time processing of communications and transaction-related data.

  • Deal value: $1 billion (estimated)
  • Stake: 90
  • Consideration: stock

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · ISBA
item.ns0:headline: Acquires Grand River Commerce for $5.72 cash or 0.1415x ISBA stock (est.)
item.description:
Acquires Grand River Commerce for $5.72 cash or 0.1415x ISBA stock (est.)

Corporation entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Grand River Commerce, Inc. through a merger, offering Grand River shareholders $5.72 per share in cash or 0.1415 Isabella shares per Grand River share, subject to proration that caps cash elections at 35% of total shares. The aggregate cash consideration is $18.3M plus up to approximately 839,003 Isabella shares. The transaction is subject to Grand River shareholder approval, Nasdaq listing of the Isabella shares to be issued, and regulatory approvals from the Federal Reserve and Michigan banking authorities.

About: Isabella Bank Corporation operates as the bank holding company for Isabella Bank that provides banking and wealth management services to businesses, institutions, and individuals and their families in Michigan, the United States. The company offers deposit products, including checking and savings accounts; and certificates of deposit, direct deposits, and cash management services.

  • Counterparty: Grand River Commerce, Inc.
  • Offer price: $5.72 cash or 0.1415x ISBA shares
  • Consideration: cash+stock
  • Announced: 2026-06-11

item.title: ⚔️ Proxy Contest · Proxy Contest · BHR
item.ns0:headline: Nominates full director slate at Braemar; accuses board of $480M self-dealing
item.description:
Nominates full director slate at Braemar; accuses board of $480M self-dealing

Al Shams Investments, Braemar's largest shareholder, sent an open letter to the board accusing it of authorizing a hotel sale that triggered a $480M termination fee to a company controlled by Chair Monty Bennett. Al Shams intends to nominate a full slate of independent directors for the 2026 Annual Meeting and pursue legal remedies against the board and Bennett. The activist has escalated since May 2026; BHR stock fell 15% following the disclosure.

About: Braemar Hotels & Resorts Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on the high-growth luxury hotel and resort sector. The Company targets high-performance luxury urban and resort properties, specializing in assets that generate revenue per available room (RevPAR) at least twice the U.S. national average. Its industry-leading portfolio features luxury properties across the United States and the U.S. territories in the Caribbean.

  • Consideration: empty
  • Announced: 2026-06-15

item.description:
Merging with Goldgroup Mining; special meeting July 2 for vote

Shareholders are asked to vote on a proposed merger with Goldgroup Mining Inc. at a Special Meeting on July 2, 2026. The Board unanimously recommends voting FOR. The merger combines the Don David Gold Mine with Goldgroup's producing assets to create a multi-mine precious metals producer. No per-share consideration was disclosed in this filing.

About: Gold Resource Corporation engages in the exploration, development, and production of gold and silver projects in the United States. The company also explores copper, lead, and zinc deposits. The company holds 100% interest in the Don David gold mine, including two production stage and four exploration stage properties located in Oaxaca, Mexico that cover approximately 55,119 hectares.

item.title: 🪙 Debt Restr. · INIKF
item.ns0:headline: Converts $32.2M debt to equity; 62.5% dilution; $25.8M cash pending
item.description:
Converts $32.2M debt to equity; 62.5% dilution; $25.8M cash pending

Ionik Corporation completed the equity conversion and maturity extension components of its comprehensive debt reorganization, converting approximately US$32.2 million of acquisition-related debt into 225.6 million common shares at prices from US$0.109 to US$0.33. The conversion increases shares outstanding by 62.5% to ~586.6 million undiluted. Remaining cash repayments of ~US$25.8 million are expected to be funded by a new senior debt facility; the transaction used a financial hardship exemption and is subject to TSXV final acceptance.

About: Ionik Corporation operates as a multi-platform technology company in the United States and internationally. It offers technology-enabled marketing and advertising solutions for brands, advertisers, and publishers. It operates through Marketing Optimization and Media Activation. Ionik Corporation is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.

  • Announced: 2026-06-02
  • Expected Close: Equity conversion completed June 11; cash repayment pending new facility

item.description:
Acquires COPEL's 23% DFESA stake for R$150M cash; total 100% for R$300M

Gerdau entered into a binding Share Purchase Agreement with COPEL to acquire COPEL's 23.03% equity interest in DFESA for an enterprise value of R$150 million, payable in cash at closing. Combined with a prior agreement to buy CELESC's stake, Gerdau will hold 100% of DFESA for a total enterprise value of R$300 million. The transaction is subject to Brazilian antitrust approval and other customary conditions.

About: Gerdau S.A., together with its subsidiaries, operates as a steel producer company. It operates through Brazil Business, North America Business, and South America Business segments. The company offers rebars, bars, wires, thick plates, hot rolled coils, billets, blooms, plates, wire rods, and structural profiles. It also provides special steel products for agricultural, automotive, construction, distribution, energy, industrial, and mining markets.

item.description:
Exchanges $7.17M debt for Series C convertible preferred + warrants

Entered into an exchange agreement with Index Equity US, LLC (related party) to cancel $7,169,073 of principal and accrued interest in exchange for shares of newly designated Series C Convertible Preferred Stock (stated value $1,000) and a warrant to purchase up to 619,084 common shares at $2.895 per share. The preferred shares are convertible at $2.895 per share into up to 2.48M common shares (floor conversion price $1.50). The debt was immediately cancelled. The preferred stock carries 8% dividend (9% if not paid in cash) and ranks senior to common stock.

About: RenX Enterprises Corp. engages in the biomass recycling, logistics, and real estate businesses. The company is involved in engineered soils, mulch production, and materials processing, such as compost, spoil, and muclh. It serves municipal entities, construction contractors, and landscaping companies. The company was formerly known as Safe and Green Development Corporation and changed its name to RenX Enterprises Corp.in December 2025.
